title: NLP and Computer Vision Foundations
shortSummary: Survey the two classic deep learning application domains that still shape frontier product and robotics work.
whyItMatters: A compact grounding in NLP and CV helps you read papers, evaluate specialized models, and understand how frontier roles branch into multimodal and embodied systems.
coreConcepts: Text pipelines, tokenization, and sequence modeling
Image pipelines, augmentations, and perception tasks
Evaluation for text and vision tasks
Transfer learning and embeddings across domains
How these foundations feed frontier multimodal systems
